\noindent The relevant \ttblue{R} functions are
\ttblue{dbinom()} for the probabilities $P(k =
k)$ and \ttblue{pbinom()} for cumulative
probabilities $P(k \leq k)$. Both functions use
the parameters \ttblue{k}, \ttblue{n} and $\pi =
M / N$.


\par\addvspace{\topsep}
\begingroup
\fvset{listparameters={%
  \setlength{\topsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\partopsep}{0pt}%
  \setlength{\parsep}{0pt}%

}}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
binom.pmf(1, 60, 17 / 331)
binom.cdf(1, 60, 17 / 331)
\end{Verbatim}
\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_light_blue}]
[1] 0.1373314

[1] 0.1796079
\end{Verbatim}
